item.title: Walser — Running with the Devil
item.description: Author: Robert Walser Title: Running with the Devil: Power, Gender, and Madness in Heavy Metal Music Year: 1993 Type: Academic book (Wesleyan University Press) This is the book that took metal’s sound seriously enough to analyze it.

item.title: Dawes — What Are You Doing Here?
item.description: Author: Laina Dawes Title: What Are You Doing Here? A Black Woman’s Life and Liberation in Heavy Metal Year: 2012 Type: Book (Bazillion Points) The title is a question the author kept getting asked at shows.

item.title: Weinstein — Heavy Metal
item.description: Author: Deena Weinstein Title: Heavy Metal: The Music and Its Culture Year: 1991 (as Heavy Metal: A Cultural Sociology; revised 2000) Type: Academic book (Lexington Books; revised edition Da Capo) The founding sociology of metal was written by a fan in the culture’s defense.

item.title: Christe — Sound of the Beast
item.description: Author: Ian Christe Title: Sound of the Beast: The Complete Headbanging History of Heavy Metal Year: 2003 Type: Book (HarperEntertainment) The dating is the thesis.

item.title: Hip hop
item.description: Periodc. 1973–presentNamed1979 (“Rapper’s Delight” put the syllables on a record; the coinage is conventionally credited to Keef Cowboy, c.

item.title: Bob Dylan

item.title: Brian Wilson
item.description: Era1962–2022 (primary period: 1963–1967)InstrumentVocals, piano, bassGenresBaroque popSunshine popPop rockPsychedelic popProgressive popSceneHawthorne / HollywoodCaliforniaListenRYM·Apple Music·Spotify The opening chord of “God Only Knows” (1966) — an A major with a suspended fourth dropping to a th...

item.title: Chuck Berry
item.description: Era1955–1964 (primary period)InstrumentGuitar, vocalsGenresRock & rollRhythm & bluesSceneChicago (Chess Records)ListenRYM·Apple Music·Spotify The intro to “Johnny B.
